# Phase K3 — Overlap-free portfolio

Source: best-per-seed K3 combined (n=818)
After session-overlap dedup: **97 strategies**

Dedup rule: within (sym, setup, tf), keep entries whose sessions do not overlap.
Overlap mapping: LONDON_NY ⊇ {LONDON, NY}; ALL_DAY ⊇ {ASIA, LONDON, NY}.
Greedy by calmar desc — broader session is dropped if a better-calmar specific session is present.
